data.title: L3Harris Technologies Q4 Earnings Assessment
data.description:
The earnings results for L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) for Q4 were made public on Thursday, January 29, 2026 at 06:55 AM.

Here's a comprehensive overview of the announcement.

Earnings

L3Harris Technologies beat estimated earnings by 4.0%, reporting an EPS of $2.86 versus an estimate of $2.76.

Revenue was up $125.00 million from the same period last year.

Overview of Past Earnings

In the previous quarter, the company beat on EPS by $0.13, resulting in a 2.0% drop change in the share price the following day.

New investors should note that it is sometimes not an earnings beat or miss that most affects the price of a stock, but the guidance (or forecast).
